params.name: Art of Ninja
params.description:
On May 8, 1676 AD, "Art of Ninja", which would later be considered the Bible for ninjas, was finally finished.
The many clans of Yamato ninjas considered themselves orthodox. After the unification of Yamato, Ninja Master Fujibayashi compiled various ninjutsu arts into a book.
